name: Best Chocolate Cake with Fudge Frosting
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces unsweetened chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2-inches; 3 round pans, 8 x 1-1/2 inches; or 2 round pans, 9 x 1-1/2 inches.
3. Beat all ingredients except Fudge Frosting in a large bowl on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Pour batter into prepared pans.
6. Bake rectangular pan for 40 to 45 minutes; round pans for 30 to 35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Cool rounds for 10 minutes, then remove from pans and cool completely.
8. Prepare Fudge Frosting by mixing all ingredients except vanilla in a 2-1/2-quart saucepan.
9. Heat mixture to rolling boil, stirring occasionally. Boil until it reaches a rolling boil, without stirring.
10. Remove saucepan from heat and place it in a bowl of ice and water. Beat until the frosting is smooth and has a spreading consistency.
11. Stir in vanilla.
12. Frost the cake by filling layers with 1/3 cup frosting and frosting the sides and top with the remaining frosting.
